title: You Deleted Everything and AWS Is Still Charging You
summary: AWS Developers shares a step-by-step cleanup checklist to identify and prevent surprise charges after deleting AWS resources. The video covers hidden costs from orphaned resources like RDS snapshots, EBS volumes, elastic IPs, and NAT gateways, and recommends setting up billing alarms for cost monitoring.
